name: SEAI Domestic Solar PV Grant
description: Domestic grant for homes built pre-2021. €700/kWp up to 2kWp, €200/kWp up to 4kWp. Capped at €1,800.

name: SEAI Non-Domestic Microgen Grant (Solar PV)
description: Grant amount is based on installed system size (kWp) using SEAI tier schedule.

name: TAMS 3 Solar Capital Investment Scheme (SCIS)
description: Solar PV grant for farms under SCIS. Modelled as 60% of eligible cost with an investment ceiling of €90,000 (i.e. max grant €54,000).
